message:
chore: Sync CI workflow and redact crate improvements

- Update GitHub Actions CI workflow
- Refine pt-common ID handling
- Simplify pt-redact detection and canonicalization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,3 +50,54 @@ jobs:
               bash -n "$file" 2>/dev/null || true
             fi
           done
+
+  tests:
+    name: Tests (${{ matrix.os }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Install Bash 5 (macOS)
+        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
+        run: |
+          brew install bash
+          echo "/opt/homebrew/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
+          /opt/homebrew/bin/bash --version
+
+      - name: Install BATS
+        run: |
+          git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/bats-core/bats-core.git
+          cd bats-core
+          sudo ./install.sh /usr/local
+
+      - name: Install gum (for integration tests)
+        run: |
+          if [[ "$RUNNER_OS" == "Linux" ]]; then
+            sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
+            curl -fsSL https://repo.charm.sh/apt/gpg.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/charm.gpg
+            echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/charm.gpg] https://repo.charm.sh/apt/ * *" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/charm.list
+            sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y gum
+          else
+            brew install gum
+          fi
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Run BATS tests
+        run: |
+          bats --tap test/
+        env:
+          TERM: xterm-256color
+
+      - name: Upload test results
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: test-results-${{ matrix.os }}
+          path: test/
+          retention-days: 14
